response.justification: The candidate has extensive fullstack development experience, strong TypeScript and React knowledge, and a proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., Optilyz, re:cinq). However, their PostgreSQL experience is limited compared to other relational databases, and their recent focus leans heavily toward AI-agent infrastructure rather than core fullstack development.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise across multiple fullstack roles
Experience with scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Optilyz, micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to lead and deliver complex projects (e.g., GISCollective, Apple TV app top 10 ranking)
concerns: Limited PostgreSQL experience; primarily uses MongoDB and other databases
Recent role emphasizes AI-agent infrastructure, which may not align with core fullstack development needs
High on-site presence required, but candidate’s recent roles are remote-friendly (e.g., re:cinq)

key_factors.factor: Recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure vs. core fullstack
